ブラウザだけで完結する！大容量ファイルの共有術: Browser-Only! Techniques for Sharing Large Files

ビジネスの現場やプライベートで大きなファイル（高画質な動画や撮影データ、大容量の: When you want to send large files (high-resolution videos, shoot data, large PDF materials, etc.) to someone in business or private life, it is very awkward to ask them to "install this cloud app" or "create an account". This is especially true if the recipient is a client unfamiliar with IT operations, where introducing a new tool itself becomes a major barrier to communication.
ファイルのアップロード中は、ブラウザのタブを閉じたり、別のウェブサイトに遷移した: While uploading files, please do not close the browser tab or navigate to another website. You must keep the page open until the progress bar reaches 100% and displays "Upload complete".
数百メガバイトからギガバイトクラスの大容量ファイルをアップロード・ダウンロードす: When uploading or downloading large files ranging from hundreds of megabytes to gigabytes, please avoid mobile data connections (4G/5G) and use a stable, high-speed Wi-Fi connection or wired LAN environment whenever possible. ブラウザのタブやウィンドウを閉じない: Do Not Close Browser Tabs or Windows
ブラウザ完結の最大の強みは、デバイスやOSの壁を完全に無視できる点にあります。W: The greatest advantage of being browser-based is that it completely ignores the barriers of devices and operating systems. You can combine Windows, Mac, Linux, iPadOS, iOS, or Android without any issues. Even combinations like "iPhone to Windows PC" or "Mac to Android smartphone", which used to be tedious because Bluetooth transfer or AirDrop could not be used, connect instantly just by accessing the FS!QR webpage. Leverage this overwhelming accessibility to accelerate your team's work speed even further.
FS!QRは「保存」ではなく「一時的な受け渡し（共有）」を目的として設計されてい: FS!QR is designed for the purpose of "temporary handoff (sharing)" rather than "saving". Once the period specified during upload (several hours to several days) passes, or depending on settings, when the download is completed, the actual data on the server is completely erased by the system. Since the data does not remain permanently, the future risk of information leakage can be minimized. This design provides peace of mind for business users who handle confidential or personal information.
FS!QRは、アップロードされたデータをそのまま（無圧縮・無劣化）で相手に引き渡: FS!QR delivers the uploaded data to the recipient as-is (uncompressed and lossless), and automatically deletes it from the server once the temporary sharing is completed. This allows you to use the service cleanly without taking up your own cloud storage space.
大容量ファイル共有を巡る「よくある悩み」: Common Worries Regarding Large File Sharing
送りたいファイルが複数（大量の画像やフォルダ構造など）ある場合は、個別にアップロ: If you have multiple files to send (a large number of images, folder structures, etc.), we recommend combining them into a single "ZIP file" using your PC or smartphone functions before uploading, rather than uploading them individually. This allows the recipient to download and extract everything at once with a single tap, significantly reducing the effort required to receive them.
FS!QRなら、送り手も受け手もスマートフォンのSafariやChrome、PC: With FS!QR, as long as both the sender and recipient have Safari or Chrome on their smartphone, or a PC browser (Edge, Chrome, Safari, etc.), everything is completed without installing any additional software or apps. Registration of email addresses or phone numbers is also not required, allowing you to start sharing in just a few clicks while keeping your privacy completely intact.
